'''Godiban Bakoosta''' was the lieutenant of [[Lojrak Shrag]], and helped him run a [[Salt/Legends|salt]]-[[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation on [[Cona/Legends|Cona]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was killed in a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] raid.

==Appearances==
